units.content: system includes claim 29 and claim 30 as components
system further includes a routing component
routing component is configured to perform specific operations
routing component receives a detected crack or detected cyclic subgraph from convergence analyzer of claim 1 or loop-gain analyzer of claim 22
routing component determines dispatch target based on presence or absence of dynamical-signature annotation of claim 23
detected crack or cyclic subgraph is dispatched to counterfactual generator of claim 29, experimental-design generator of claim 30, or both in parallel, depending on determination
routing component records a typed dispatch event in the append-only event log of claim 1
dispatch event specifies the detected crack or cyclic subgraph, the dispatch decision, and the selected generator or generators
